_legend: real = mirrors actual IITP functions; dummy = framing
heading: Key Responsibilities

intro.value: The SAO coordinates the services that shape day-to-day student life.

items.title: Residential Life & Hostels
items.body: Coordinating hostel administration, wardens, mess, and the hostel councils that run cultural, sports, technical and maintenance activities.

items.title: Students' Gymkhana & Clubs
items.body: Supporting the student council, technical and cultural clubs, and inter-hostel / inter-department events.

items.title: Health & Wellness
items.body: Liaising with the campus health center and counselling services for physical and mental wellbeing.

items.title: Career & Counselling
items.body: Working with the Centre for Career Development and Counselling (CCDC) on guidance, mentorship and placement support.

items.title: Scholarships & Financial Aid
items.body: Helping students access scholarships, fee assistance and emergency financial support.

items.title: Safety & Grievance Redressal
items.body: Anti-ragging enforcement, ICC/WGRC, SC/ST/OBC cell coordination, and a fair grievance process.
